Converting 29.21:
29.21 * 1.989:
29.21 * 0.009 = 0.26289
29.21 * 0.080 = 2.33680
29.21 * 0.900 = 26.28900
29.21 * 1.000 = 29.21000
0.26289 + 2.33680 = 2.59969
2.59969 + 26.28900 = 28.88869
28.88869 + 29.21000 = 58.09869
= 58.098

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{58.098}
